events.title: v0 Prompt to Production — Seattle [Vercel x AI Collective]
events.description:
We're bringing Vercel's global "Prompt to Production" event to Seattle for the very first time. Think of it as a hands-on build session where you'll take an idea and ship an actual, live application in one evening using v0.
When & Where:
Date: Thursday, 05 February 2026
Time: 3:00pm - 5:00pm
Location: Comotion Labs @ Startup Hall
What's happening:
This is very much a doing session. Whether you're testing out a startup idea or exploring AI tooling, you'll walk away with something deployed and live.
You'll learn how to use v0 to generate UI components quickly and combine them with modern frameworks to build faster
Everyone gets free credits to use v0 during the session
Whatever gets built enters a global showcase - the v0 team picks winners who get featured in the community plus some swag
Schedule:
3:00pm — Welcome, quick v0 intro video
3:30pm — Start building (we'll have some prompt ideas if you need them)
4:30pm — Show what you made + community voting
5:00pm — Wrap up, photos, hang out
Who should come?
Anyone curious about this space. Frontend devs, founders prototyping, students, people exploring AI and web development. If you want to see what building with AI tools actually looks like in practice, come through.
What to bring: If you're joining in person bring your laptop and a kickass idea!

Please be advised: Unfortunately, space is very limited at these community events and we can not always accept everyone we would like to. If you are not accepted to this event, please keep applying! We appreciate your application tremendously and we are looking forward to seeing you at a future event very soon!
The AI Collective is a global non-profit building the human layer for the AI age. We unite 150,000+ leaders, builders, and stakeholders across 100+ forums worldwide to democratize the frontier, build trust, and coordinate how society navigates the rapid acceleration of technological progress.
All attendees and organizers at events affiliated with The AI Collective agree to our privacy policy and are subject to our code of conduct.

events.title: 🧠 The AI Collective Seattle x Innomat AI | The Robotic AI Revolution
events.description:
AI x Robotics: Building the Future of Manufacturing
Hosted by The AI Collective & InnoMat.AI
📍 Northeastern University | 225 Terry Ave N, Seattle, WA 98109
📅 Thursday, November 13, 2025 | 🕔 5:00 PM – 7:00 PM

🔧 Where Cutting-Edge Tech Meets Real-World Deployment
Join us for an evening that brings together researchers, founders, and investors working at the frontier of AI and robotics for physical industries. This event focuses on the real challenges and real opportunities of building and scaling intelligent systems for manufacturing, construction, and infrastructure.
You'll hear from top minds in computer vision, human-robot interaction, optimization, deep tech investing, and AI product leadership—including voices from Northeastern, UW, Qualcomm, Broadcom, InnoMat.AI, and Madrona Venture Group.
Agenda
5.00 pm | Door opens
5.30 pm | Welcome - The AI Collective & Northeastern University
6:00 pm | Innomat AI Presentation
6:15 pm | Dinner & Snack Break
6.30 pm | Fireside chat - Modern Manufacturing: From Research to Deployment
7.30 pm | Networking

🎤 Featured Speakers
Dr. Joseph Weber – Director of ECE, Northeastern University Seattle | Computer Vision Scientist
Dr. Xian Li – Professor of ECE | Expert in Human-Robot Collaboration
Dr. Léonard Boussioux – Professor at UW Foster | MIT PhD in General AI & Optimization
Rolanda Fu – Investor at Madrona | Investing in Tech & AI Companies
Neel Kishan – AI GTM & Product Lead at Qualcomm
Charlie Sun – Founder of InnoMat.AI | Machine Learning Lead
Bhola Chhetri – Solutions Architect at Broadcom | Moderator, The AI Collective

💡 What You’ll Experience
🚀 Deep Dives on Applied Robotics & AI
How real-world robotics systems are built, validated, and deployed—at scale and under constraints.
💬 Fireside Discussion: From Lab to Market
From breakthrough research to venture-backed startups, learn how these leaders navigate the technical, business, and product challenges in industrial AI.
📈 Investor Perspective: What’s Fundable in Industrial Robotics?
Hear directly from Madrona about how they evaluate frontier-tech startups—and where the real opportunities lie in hardware + AI.
🤝 Curated Networking
Connect with a hand-picked group of technical founders, researchers, engineers, and early-stage investors.

👥 Who Should Attend
Robotics founders and deep tech startup teams
ML/AI engineers working on perception, simulation, or autonomous systems
VCs and innovation teams tracking industrial applications of AI
Professors, PhDs, and students focused on robotics, hardware, or embedded intelligence
Industry pros modernizing operations in manufacturing or infrastructure

🍕 Food and drinks provided. 
This is not your average AI meetup. It’s a conversation between the builders, funders, and visionaries shaping what comes next.
Please be advised: Unfortunately, space is very limited at these community events and we can not always accept everyone we would like to. If you are not accepted to this event, please keep applying! We appreciate your application tremendously and we are looking forward to seeing you at a future event very soon!

InnoMat.AI, founded by Northeastern alum Charlie Sun, is redefining how inspections are performed in manufacturing and construction. Leveraging advanced AI and robotics, InnoMat.AI’s platform automates the full inspection lifecycle—from defect detection and material validation to workflow guidance and real-time reporting. By turning manual processes into intelligent, data-driven operations, InnoMat.AI empowers engineers to make faster, more accurate decisions—improving quality, reducing downtime, and driving performance across industrial systems.

The AI Collective is a global non-profit community uniting 100,000+ pioneers – founders, researchers, operators, and investors – exploring the frontier of AI in major tech hubs worldwide. Through events, workshops, and community-led research, we empower the AI ecosystem to collaboratively steer AI’s future toward trust, openness, and human flourishing.
All attendees and organizers at events affiliated with The AI Collective agree to our privacy policy and are subject to our code of conduct.

events.title: 🧠 GenAI Collective x Madrona ☔ Seattle Frontier Technologies Forum
events.description:
We’re partnering with Madrona to bring the GenAI Collective to Seattle for the very first time!
Seattle isn’t just a city; it’s a powerhouse of AI innovation, home to tech giants like Microsoft and Amazon that are pushing the boundaries of what’s possible with AI. With a vibrant mix of AI companies, research institutions, and top-tier talent, Seattle has become a key hub for AI. That’s why the GenAI Collective is so excited to launch here – join us as we launch the community that brings together the brightest minds across disciplines to shape the future of AI.
We welcome you to a beautiful downtown waterfront venue where we’ll be deep-diving on the following four topics:
AI & the Physical World: Bridging Digital and Physical Applications
Scaling AI: Cloud Infrastructure and Enterprise Integration
From Lab to Market: Accelerating AI Research to Real-World Deployment
The role of data: Balancing its Power with its Effective Use
During this small, intimate forum, you’ll have the chance to meet with Seattle’s top emerging AI technologists and discuss the above topics in depth. In particular, we’ll be providing you with structured discussion materials and will encourage you to ideate on new ideas together.
As always, food, drink, engaging conversation, and incredible company will all be provided!
Following the Forum, there will be a cocktail welcome reception from 5:00pm - 6:30pm for the 2024 Intelligent Applications Summit kick-off. This summit is sponsored by Madrona, AWS, Microsoft, and others. You can read more about the event and formally request an invite online. Due to space constraints, this Forum event does not guarantee admission to the 10/2 IA Summit, and only includes admission to the 10/1 cocktail welcome reception.
Please be advised: Unfortunately, space is very limited at these community events and we can not always accept everyone we would like to. If you are not accepted to this event, please keep applying! We appreciate your application tremendously and we are looking forward to seeing you at a future event very soon!


The GenAI Collective is a community of 20,000+ founders, researchers, operators, and investors representing the global forum for AI and technological progress. Through events, workshops, and online forums, members foster relationships and collaborate on challenging problems to define the future of technology.
Madrona is a Seattle-based venture capital firm with nearly 30 years of experience investing in early-stage technology companies. Madrona partners with founders from day one, providing long-term support to build innovative, industry-leading businesses for the long run. The firm has more than $3 billion under management, and was an early investor in companies such as Amazon, Snowflake, UIPath, Rover, Redfin, and Smartsheet. Rooted in the Pacific Northwest, Madrona also backs companies across the country, focusing on sectors such as AI, intelligent applications, and life sciences.

events.title: Seattle Demo Night 🚀 (w. The AI Collective & Atlassian)
events.description: The AI Collective Seattle teamed up with Atlassian for an AI Demo Night at their Bellevue office, bringing together builders, founders, engineers, and AI operators for live demos, sharp conversations, and useful AI products moving from experiment to real workflow.

events.title: 🧠 The AI Collective Seattle | Make.com - Let's Build and Automate
events.description: A hands-on Make.com automation night at UW Startup Hall for Seattle builders, tinkerers, founders, and tech-curious minds. Attendees built workflows, watched live demos, and explored practical automation with peers and experts.

events.title: 🧠 The AI Collective Seattle x AI Student Collective UW | Why We Invested:  VC × Founder Case Studies
events.description: A live look at how real AI deals come together, hosted with AI Student Collective at UW and the Buerk Center for Entrepreneurship. The session explored thesis, diligence, term sheets, founder framing, investor conviction, and early AI startup traction.

events.title: AI Collective Seattle X Vercept: Madrona IA Summit Roundtable 2025
events.description: A Madrona IA Summit roundtable with Vercept and The AI Collective Seattle, featuring Vercept Vy demos, topic-specific working groups, build sessions, group presentations, and a reception for applied AI builders.

events.title: Windsurf Open Build powered by The AI Collective
events.description: A special evening with Windsurf and The AI Collective for developers, founders, and builders exploring AI-native tools. The event included a Windsurf presentation, breakout vibe sessions, optional demos, and peer building time.

events.title: Scoop & Scale: Ice Cream Social for Founders & Funders 🍦
events.description: A Seattle Tech Week ice cream social for founders, operators, investors, and funders, hosted by AI Collective and Madrona with Molly Moon's on the pier.

events.title: Zero to Product: Building with 100% AI
events.description: A builder session with Seattle founders showing how they built full products with AI, from concept to code to live users. The program included live demos, stack walkthroughs, lessons learned, and a co-build mini hack session.

events.title: Seattle Demo Day - ROAM
events.description: An exclusive Seattle Demo Day at Seattle AI House celebrating startups and founders shaping the future of AI, with demos, food, drinks, and community conversation sponsored by Roam.
